title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at SpiceJet Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at SpiceJet Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!
